title: drymocallis saviczii
side_effects: Drymocallis saviczii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, as well as allergic reactions like skin irritation and respiratory problems in sensitive individuals. In severe cases, using the plant for an extended period can lead to liver and kidney damage due to its toxic compounds. Some people may also experience headaches, dizziness, and fatigue after consuming or applying the plant's extract. If ingested in large quantities or without proper guidance, Drymocallis saviczii can have serious consequences for one's health.
